todos.content: Call pdf_agent to convert and deeply analyze /test_demo/pdfs/attention.pdf and /test_demo/pdfs/gpt4.pdf; produce text conversions, per-paper analyses, comparative analysis, combined report, extracted tables as CSVs, and a merged PDF under /_outputs/pdf_task_output
